decisions.decision: Establish context-engineering system for AI governance
decisions.rationale: Ensure consistent decisions across files, commits, and refactors. Prevent architectural drift and preserve long-term goals.

decisions.decision: Use IVX prefix for all public SDK types
decisions.rationale: Avoid naming collisions with consumer code, enable easy discovery via autocomplete, clearly identify SDK types.

decisions.decision: Mark third-party SDK folders as read-only zones
decisions.rationale: Third-party code is upstream maintained. Changes would be lost on SDK updates. Wrapper patterns preferred.

decisions.decision: Use -force-d3d11 as the recommended Unity Editor fallback when D3D12 is unstable on NVIDIA drivers
decisions.rationale: Unity 6 projects can crash on startup under D3D12 for some NVIDIA driver versions. D3D11 provides a stable editor experience without code changes.
alternatives: Keep D3D12 and require driver rollbacks
